title: New Member L1 Rocket Design Meeting
description: The team gathered to begin designing Level 1 rockets for incoming members — covering motor selection, airframe design, recovery systems, and certification requirements.

title: Quad Cities Rocketry Club Launch
description: The team participated in a launch event at the QCRC field in Princeton, Illinois — flying G7 and gathering performance data to inform the G8 program.

title: Fiscal Sponsorship Accepted
description: Batavia Aerospace has been officially accepted for fiscal sponsorship through HCB — a major milestone enabling the team to receive donations, grow operations, and pursue more ambitious projects.
